title: Wavesong
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Wavesong''''' was a [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was commanded by a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] named [[Elpfel]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-10-XX -->''[[Star Wars Trilogy Sourcebook, Special Edition]]''
